videos.title: Build AI Apps with Python and OpenAI API (Beginner Tutorial)
videos.description: Get started with the OpenAI API to integrate powerful AI models into your Python applications. This video covers making API calls for text generation, embeddings, and more, providing a foundational understanding for programmatic AI interaction.

videos.title: Build a ChatGPT-like App in Python using Streamlit
videos.description: Learn how to build interactive web-based AI applications using Streamlit. This tutorial demonstrates combining the OpenAI API with Streamlit to create a user-friendly interface for your AI projects, focusing on rapid prototyping.

videos.title: LangChain Beginner Tutorial: How to Build LLM Apps with Python
videos.description: Explore LangChain, a powerful framework for developing applications powered by large language models. This video introduces core concepts like chains, agents, and data augmentation, essential for building more complex and context-aware AI applications.

videos.title: Build a Custom PDF Chatbot App with LangChain and Streamlit
videos.description: Dive into a practical project to build an end-to-end AI chatbot that can chat with custom PDF documents. This tutorial integrates LangChain, OpenAI's API, and Streamlit to showcase how to combine various tools for a complete AI application.
